cooperative.note: No OS read-denial; honor-system. Cannot claim probe-proven isolation. Spec 2.2.

standard.note: OS read-denial sandbox (macOS sandbox-exec / Linux bwrap). Usable only when the platform backend is available AND the startup denial probe passes; else fail-closed. Spec 7.2.

hardened.note: Builder in a Docker container; control root never mounted (denial by construction, probe-verified); verifier under host OS read-denial. Requires running Docker daemon + signed audit. Spec 7.2/2.2.

enterprise.note: Builder in a Docker container with kernel-locked egress-to-proxy (iptables default-deny egress, NET_ADMIN dropped for the child so the lock cannot be undone) + a restrictive seccomp profile, on top of every hardened guarantee. Requires split-custody sign-off (K-of-N ed25519 approvers), a required off-box audit sink, required builder confinement, and signed audit; qualified only once the custody threshold is met. Linux-container primitives (iptables, dropped-capability bounding set) are probe-verified live; any missing/weakened guarantee is a fail-closed ConfigError at load, and a failing egress/seccomp probe is a fail-closed refusal at run start. Spec 2.2/7.2-7.5.
